title: Level 1: The Skeleton (HTML Basics)
description: HTML kya hai aur kaise kaam karta hai.
guide:
Namaste! Level 1 me swagat hai.

Aaj hum website ka Skeleton (Dhancha) banayenge. Jaise insaan ke andar haddiyan (bones) hoti hain, waise hi website ke andar HTML hota hai.

HTML ka matlab hai HyperText Markup Language.

Aapka Mission:

Code me likhe hue Comments ko dhyan se padhein. Har line ka matlab Hindi me samjhaya gaya hai!
